content.en:
The Chaos Golden Desolate Technique broke through to the eighth layer of the Dacheng realm, and the establishment of the Hunyuan System and the Heavenly Sword System made Ye Tian's strength increase a lot.

Now, although he is still at the level of Dominating the Extreme Cultivation, his combat power has already stepped into the realm of the fourth-rank supreme, but he has only just crossed the threshold, and there is still a big gap between him and the old fourth-rank supreme such as the Kunwu Supreme.

However, Ye Tian is now enough to save his life in the hands of the Kunwu Supreme, but if he compares with the third-rank Supreme, Ye Tian's gap is too big, and it is a little difficult to escape for his life.

"My ability to escape is still a little worse now, but it's a pity that the space powers in the human race are relatively ordinary, and there are only a few space powers for escape, and I may be invincible in the Domination Realm, but there is absolutely no way to escape from the hands of the third-class supreme!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

From Hamon's memory, there are great supernatural powers in the chaos, and some powerful supernatural powers are extremely rebellious, but these great supernatural powers are relatively difficult to learn, and Hamon may have a similar inheritance of great supernatural powers, but he has not absorbed them.

Moreover, the more supernatural the heavens, the higher the cultivation requirements, and the higher the requirements for understanding.

"I wonder if I can break the barrier of the last secret room now?"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

His current strength is much stronger than before, if he uses the Hunyuan Slash, although he can't reach the attack power of the third-rank supreme, but he can reach the power of the third-rank supreme, which is much more powerful than before, and may be able to cause some damage to the enchantment.

So, Ye Tian walked to the last secret room enchantment, accumulated strength, and performed the strongest secret technique against the enchantment-Hunyuan Slash!

Rumble!!!

Hunyuan slashed and slammed into the barrier, causing a huge shock.

Click!

This voice made Ye Tian excited.

"It works!"

Ye Tian was excited.

I thought I wouldn't be able to break the enchantment, but I didn't expect it to have a certain impact on the enchantment.

However, just one blow of Hunyuan Slash still can't break the barrier, and many multiple attacks will do.

But the loss of Hunyuan Slash to Ye Tian is very large, and it will definitely not work if he continues to use it, so he must recover.

"Time accelerates!"

Ye Tian used time acceleration to recover his strength, so that he could recover faster.

Under Ye Tian's full use of time acceleration and some healing treasures, it only took ten seconds from the outside world to fully recover.

Ten seconds later.

Ye Tian once again performed the Hunyuan Slash!

In this way, every ten seconds, Ye Tian would perform a Hunyuan Slash on the enchantment.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Under Ye Tian's continuous powerful attacks of the Hunyuan Slash, the enchantment clicked, and the light continued to dim.

Ten times!

Hundreds!

Two hundred times!

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had cast the Hunyuan Slash and how many resources he had consumed, but he knew that the enchantment had been being consumed by him, and there were more and more rifts.

As long as he persists, this barrier will surely shatter.

Half a day has passed.

Suddenly.

There was a bang!!

It was a series of shattering sounds, representing the complete shattering of the barrier.

"Finally shattered!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, if he continued to consume like this, he would lose a lot.

Thankfully, he broke the barrier and was able to enter the last chamber.

At this point, he was curious about what treasures this last chamber could bring him.

Click!

Ye Tian pushed open the door of the secret room and walked in.

"Just three things?"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

It stands to reason that this last secret room is the most important secret room, and there must be a lot of treasures, but I didn't expect it to be just three things.

"I hope these three things are what I need, otherwise it will be a waste of time and resources!"

Ye Tian said worriedly.

One thing he was sure of was that these three treasures were certainly precious, but precious things were not necessarily useful to him.

After all, the Dao that each cultivator cultivates is different, and the things they lack are also different, for example, if Ye Tian has some things, he no longer needs similar things.

Some treasures, one piece is enough, and more is a waste.

If all three of these things work mediocre for him, or if they are of no use at all, then you will be taking three scrap items.

Ye Tian walked over and took a closer look at the three treasures.

Among them is a leather scroll, which has the breath of chaotic life on it, making Ye Tiandu tremble faintly, this should be the skin of a chaotic creature comparable to the powerhouse of the Heavenly Mandate Realm in the chaos, and it should have recorded some exercises or secret techniques.

Ye Tian opened it and looked at it, and then his pupils shrank sharply, and he was excited.

"Magical Escape!"

What is recorded above is a kind of speed-type supernatural power retreat, called - Hengguang supernatural power!

Judging from the introduction, this magical power is very powerful, ranking one of the three thousand great magical powers of Chaos, and the specific ranking is 172nd!

172nd place seems to be very backward, but this is relative to the whole chaos!

How big the chaos is, even if a universe is placed in chaos, it is just a small dot, and these great supernatural powers in the universe, such as the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, will not enter the stream at all when placed in chaos, and even the three thousand great supernatural powers are far from being arranged.

And Hengguang Shentong can rank 172nd, which shows how powerful it is.

However, the constant light supernatural power is difficult to cultivate, and its cultivation conditions are very harsh.

Ye Tian felt that if Hamon obtained this constant light supernatural power, it was estimated that he could only be dumbfounded, and he might be able to practice it in the future, but Hamon would definitely not be able to practice it now.

Constant light supernatural powers, which require the fusion of god-level speed talent and god-level light talent, can be cultivated. And cultivating the Constant Light Divine Power requires the innate origin of the thing, the innate light source, and only when these two conditions are met can you cultivate!

"Harmon doesn't have the fusion talent of god-level speed talent and god-level light talent, he will definitely not be able to practice, and it is said that some treasures can fuse god-level speed talent and god-level light talent, but those treasures are too rare, I have never heard of them, and they are relatively rare in chaos. Why did the Tibetan God Organization put this supernatural power here? Could it be that it was deliberately placed here, and by the way, let Harmon and other reincarnated beings collect the innate light source?"

Ye Tian guessed.

This is very likely, because there is an innate light source in the universe.

The innate light source is a low-level innate origin thing in the universe, much lower than the origin well, but no matter how low-level, it is also an innate origin thing, which is very rare, but it is expected to be obtained.

"For Harmon and the others, or for the Tibetan God Organization, it is extremely difficult to fuse talents, because speed talents and light talents are talents of two systems, and it is too difficult and difficult to forcibly fuse, and rare special treasures are required. But my copy talent can forcibly fuse two talents, and I have fused time and space talents before, and it is naturally possible to fuse light talents and speed talents. Before, if I wanted to fuse twelve attribute talents to form a chaos talent, it would take hundreds of millions of years, and I couldn't wait for hundreds of millions of years. But it won't be long before I can fuse the speed talent and the light talent, and I can completely fuse it. Therefore, the first cultivation condition is not difficult for me, and the difficult condition is the second condition, the innate light source!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In any case, this is a great divine power that has reached the 172nd place in the chaos, ranking among the three thousand great divine powers of chaos, if he is practiced, he is even sure to escape in front of the third-class supreme, and if he cultivates to a high and profound realm, he may be able to easily escape from the hands of the second-class supreme who is the first-class supreme.

"Let's first merge the light talent and the speed talent!"

【Fusion of Aurora Talent and Speed Talent】

Integrating ......

Ye Tian took a look, it will take 1000 years!

1000 years is nothing to him, just so he can take advantage of this period of time to collect the innate light source, once the innate light source is collected, and the aurora talent and the speed talent are fused, then he can immediately cultivate the constant light supernatural power.
